note: Field keys illustrate the custom field map; the authoritative field-key to field-id map lives in the CONVERTFLOW shared resolver and ghl-design.md. Never a fleet client; fictional brand for regression only.
jobKeyFormula: pd- plus contactId plus first 16 hex of sha256 of the canonical submission

fields.podcast_survey_q1: The work of my hands was never the thing worth saving; the room and the people in it were, and letting one person see me struggling is what brought me back.
fields.podcast_interview_smiq: Yes, I am comfortable sharing that I nearly closed the studio during a hard winter.
fields.podcast_survey_stories: A big wholesale order fell through in autumn; a long-standing account closed; my father got sick two states away; I stopped feeling anything at the wheel; a longtime customer named Ruth asked to sit on the student stool and watch me throw one bowl.
fields.podcast_survey__additional_info: I want it to feel like a fireside confession, not a tidy business lesson.
fields.podcast_visual_description: A warm, dim pottery studio at night, a single lamp over a wheel, two hands shaping a bowl, steam on a cold front window.
